location: Random drop (around 1% chance) from helmeted, Greatshield-wielding Fallen Hawk Soldiers stationed around the Nokron, Eternal City Site of Grace — in the nearby gazebo, by a tree to the northeast, on some stairs, inside a building, and behind a wall to the south.
tactics: Only helmeted Fallen Hawk Soldiers who carry a shield on their back can drop this — unhelmeted or spear-only soldiers don't count.
Roughly eight qualifying soldiers spawn around the Nokron grace, so resting and returning lets you re-farm the whole group.
The drop rate is low (~1%), so expect several clears; a Discovery-boosting talisman helps a lot here.
lore: A body-length iron tower shield stamped with an inverted hawk crest — standard-issue armament for the Fallen Hawk soldiers who patrol the buried city of Nokron.

builds.name: Lightweight STR turtle
builds.why: At 16.0 weight it's lighter than most greatshields for full physical negation, useful for Strength builds watching equip load.

builds.name: Guard-counter poke build
builds.why: Solid all-round negation and a 65 guard boost support a block-then-counter playstyle with a spear.
